sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48268" key="qeopo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-πόλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">priest</tr_>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θεηπόλος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
